name: Easy Spam Triangles
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into small cubes (7 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a bowl, combine SPAM, cheese, apple, and dip.
3. Cut one pie crust sheet into 8 wedges. Place about 1/4 cup of the SPAM mixture in the center of each wedge, spreading it within 1/2 inch of each edge.
4. Moisten the edges of the pastry with egg white.
5. Cut the remaining pie crust sheet into 8 wedges. Place over the filling.
6. Press the edges of the filled pastry firmly together using a fork.
7. Place on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
8. Brush with the remaining egg white and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
9. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
